case_title: RIDINGER, KIM VS UNITED HUMAN RESEARCH, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $771.34 FILED BY RIDINGER, KIM AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED HUMAN RESEARCH, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-01-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
